failures.description: Dashboard has horizontal overflow (scrollWidth > clientWidth) at 375px viewport width. This is the third consecutive cycle with this failure — Cycle 1 and Cycle 2 fix attempts (commit a6ed73a, removing a stray from dashboard.html) did not resolve it. The root cause is a CSS-level overflow issue, not a div imbalance. The fix agent MUST use Playwright to programmatically find the widest child element at 375px — use document.querySelectorAll('*') and measure getBoundingClientRect().width for each element, then identify which element exceeds 375px. Likely suspects: a wide table, a non-wrapping flex row, a min-width on a card or stat block, or a fixed-px element that doesn't collapse on mobile. Do NOT re-examine div counts or template structure without first identifying the overflowing element by width measurement.
failures.cycle_2_fix_status: Re-investigated — fix not deployed or wrong root cause
failures.fix_approach: Step 1: Open a Playwright page, navigate to /dashboard/ at 375px. Step 2: Execute JS to find all elements with offsetWidth > 375 or getBoundingClientRect().right > 375. Step 3: Fix the CSS (add overflow-x: hidden, max-width: 100%, or responsive breakpoint) or the template (replace fixed-width element with a responsive alternative). Step 4: Re-run test_21_responsive.py to confirm fix.

test_bugs.description: Stripe Elements renders card number, expiry, and CVC in separate iframes. The test fills card number in the first iframe, then looks for the expiry field ([placeholder*='MM / YY']) in that same iframe — it does not exist there. Test requires redesign to target per-field iframes individually.
test_bugs.note: Do NOT modify test file. Blocked on human review/redesign. Same failure since Cycle 1.
Do NOT modify test file. Blocked on human review/redesign. Same failure since Cycle 1.

missing_data.description: sudo -u cscbooking requires a password; NOPASSWD is not configured for this command. Tests that depend on seeded data (cancellation, booking detail, individual notification mark-read) remained skipped.
missing_data.action_needed: Add NOPASSWD sudoers entry for the seed_test_data management command, or run seed manually before each cycle.
